---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[feature request] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
SpeedKalandra deliberately avoids a few categories of feature
(see CONTRIBUTING.md → "What I won't merge"). Skimming that section
first will save us both time on requests that won't be accepted no
matter how well-designed they are: build planners, loot filters,
trade automation, telemetry, code that injects into the PoE2 process,
or anything that sends inputs to the game.

Features that fit the tool's philosophy (minimalist speedrun timing
and visualization, read-only relative to the game, no gameplay
assistance) are welcome.
-->

## What you want

<!-- Describe the feature in one or two sentences. -->

## Why it fits this tool

<!--
SpeedKalandra is:
  - Minimalist — focused on speedrun timing and visualization
  - Read-only — never sends inputs or modifies game state
  - Free of gameplay assistance — not a build planner, loot tracker, trade tool

How does your proposal sit inside those constraints?
-->

## What problem it solves for you

<!--
The use case in your own words. "I'm tracking X and currently I have
to do Y by hand" lands better than "the app should have X".
-->

## How you'd see it working

<!--
Sketch the UX:
  - Where does it appear? (overlay, settings, dialog, hotkey)
  - What does the user click / press / configure?
  - What does success look like?

A rough description is fine. Mocks or screenshots optional.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
Other ways you've thought about solving the same problem. Helps separate
"this is the feature I want" from "I want this problem solved, any
reasonable approach is fine".
-->

## Anything else

<!-- Related issues, existing tools that do this well, edge cases. Optional. -->
